scripts.build: npm run synth:silent && npm run eslint
scripts.configLocal: aws s3 cp s3://$(yarn run --silent getBucket)/config.json metaprompt-generator-client/public/
scripts.eslint: ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG=false NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 eslint --ext .ts,.tsx --fix --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern src test build-tools
scripts.getBucket: aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name AnthropicMetaPromptGenerator --region us-east-1 --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`siteBucket`].OutputValue' --output text
scripts.launch: yarn cdk bootstrap && yarn cdk deploy --require-approval never && yarn configLocal
scripts.upgrade: npx npm-check-updates@20 --upgrade --target=minor --peer --no-deprecated --dep=dev,peer,prod,optional --filter=@types/node,esbuild,eslint-import-resolver-typescript,eslint-plugin-import,ts-node,typescript,@anthropic-ai/sdk,@apollo/client,@aws-sdk/client-sfn,@types/aws-lambda,@types/fs-extra,@types/uuid,cdk-nag,dotenv,fs-extra,graphql,react && yarn install --check-files && yarn upgrade @stylistic/eslint-plugin @types/node @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin @typescript-eslint/parser aws-cdk esbuild eslint-import-resolver-typescript eslint-plugin-import eslint ts-node typescript @anthropic-ai/sdk @apollo/client @aws-sdk/client-sfn @types/aws-lambda @types/fs-extra @types/uuid aws-cdk-lib cdk-nag constructs dotenv fs-extra graphql react
